name: Direction 1
description: Indicates, for certain kinds of OTC derivatives, whether the reporting entity is the buyer (BYER) or seller (SLLR) in a transaction.
optionalityRules: Conditionally required for certain kinds of OTC derivatives.
A value must be reported for either Direction 1 or both of Direction 2—Leg 1 and Direction 2—Leg 2.
Not reported for Action types TERM, EROR, PRTO.
valueRules: If reported, the value is one of BYER or SLLR.
The applicable kinds of OTC derivatives are those for which it is widely understood that a buyer and seller are readily identified.
Associated with reference data elements of the UPI code and/or the values of Asset class and Contract type reported for the transaction.
